reference: In my opinion, she may have osteomyelitis. Check for signs of fever. Also, stasis dermatitis may be possible, but it usually occurs in both legs rather than just one. I suggest an X-ray of the leg to confirm osteomyelitis. Good luck.
text: My opinion, she may have osteomyelitis. Check for signs of fever. Also, stasis dermatitis may be possible, but it usually occurs in both legs rather than just one. I suggest an X-ray of the legs to confirm osteomyelitis. Good luck.
